rows.item: 学習意欲・授業参加度

aims:
The main objectives of this course are that participants should acquire through practice the skills required to communicate in and comprehend written, visual and spoken English genres used in professional (business) contexts.
このコースの主な目的は、受講者が専門的（ビジネス）な文脈で使用される英語の書き言葉や話し言葉でコミュニケーションをとり、理解するために必要なスキルを実践を通して習得することです。
goals: Students will acquire the skills to communicate in professional English written genres
Students will acquire the skills to communicate in professional English visual genres
Students will acquire the skills to communicate in professional English oral genres

textbooks: Materials will be supplied by the instructor
prereq: This class is designed for students who will embark on careers in which they are required to communicate in English. The class is taught in English so participants will need to have the ability to comprehend spoken English. Assessment is on a formative basis (i.e., based on several assignments / projects) so students should be prepared to participate actively in classes.
prep: Students are expected to commit sufficient time outside classroom hours to complete the assignments for this course.
teachers: ◎ マイケル シャープ
